name: spacesolution
description: Static website for Space Solutions — interior design services in Mysuru and Karnataka.

scripts.dev: node scripts/generate-menu-images.mjs && node scripts/generate-reel-thumbnails.mjs && node scripts/minify-js.mjs && astro dev
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/prepare-vendor.mjs && node scripts/generate-menu-images.mjs && node scripts/generate-reel-thumbnails.mjs && node scripts/minify-js.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/generate-menu-images.mjs && node scripts/generate-reel-thumbnails.mjs && node scripts/minify-js.mjs && astro build
